channel.title: snowflake on Shadowsong's Personal Website
channel.description: Recent content in snowflake on Shadowsong's Personal Website

item.title: Trading Log 1: Snowflake Retesting Resistance, Databricks in the Wings — Where Does That Leave the Data Platform Trade?
item.description: Snowflake is retesting its 52-week high, still well below its 2021 all-time high. I am long, I called the earnings surge correctly, and I am now asking the question every winning trade forces: when do I leave?
